description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build / Test that runs on push to all branches except those starting with pre. and on pull requests to the master branch. Use a matrix job that runs on ubuntu-22.04, windows-2019, and macos-13, with write-all permissions. Checkout the repository with submodules, set up Python 3.10, install Conan, configure CMake with a specific build type, build the project in parallel, and run tests with CTest.
